name_en: The Celine Triomphe collection is a must-have this year, it's so beautiful! It's a global hit with many bloggers and influencers posting about it. Every Triomphe piece has its own unique charm. This tofu bag is truly lovely, casual and retro, yet very stylish. It has three compartments, which is plenty of space for a girl to put in her phone and cosmetics. The shoulder strap is adjustable! It looks cooler when worn, and can be sweet or edgy. Dimensions: Large 22 16 Small 18.5 14. Item No.: Large 191242 Small 188882
